name: wikimem
description: Ingest anything (13 formats), query with any LLM, and let an Observer score + improve your wiki nightly. Bundles WikiMem's skills, slash commands, safety hooks, and MCP server so any Claude Code session can treat a directory as a self-improving knowledge base.
author: Naman Parikh <naman10parikh@gmail.com>

mcp_servers.name: wikimem
mcp_servers.description: WikiMem MCP server — exposes wikimem_search, wikimem_ingest, wikimem_ask, wikimem_lint, wikimem_list_connectors and more over stdio, scoped to the --vault directory.

tools.name: wikimem_search
tools.description: BM25 + optional semantic search across the wiki vault's pages.
tools.when_to_use: When you need to find which saved pages are relevant to a query before answering.

tools.name: wikimem_ingest
tools.description: Run a file/folder/URL through the WikiMem pipeline (extract → dedup → lint → save as page).
tools.when_to_use: When the user wants to add a source to their wiki.

tools.name: wikimem_ask
tools.description: LLM-powered Q&A against the wiki with cited pages.
tools.when_to_use: When the user asks a question that should be answered from their own saved knowledge.

install_instructions:
1. Build the package: pnpm build (produces dist/mcp-entry.js used by the MCP server).
2. Add this plugin to Claude Code: Settings -> Plugins -> Add local plugin -> select this directory.
3. The wikimem skills, /wikimem-* slash commands, safety hooks, and the wikimem MCP server are now available. Point the server at a vault with `--vault <path>`.
